reason: Defines tcrv.exec dispatch, case, fallback, variant, and runtime boundary semantics.
Constrains target capability facts and keeps hardware capability separate from runtime/control metadata.
Covers variant proposal, legality, selection, and dispatch routing responsibilities.
Defines RVV plugin locality and target-owned RVV behavior relevant to the selected branch.
Defines scalar fallback plugin locality and fallback variant expectations.
Defines export and runtime ABI boundary requirements for generated target artifacts.
Defines lit/FileCheck and compiler artifact testing expectations.
